title: psychotria hoffmannseggiana var. tribracteata
intro: Psychotria hoffmannseggiana var. tribracteata, also known as Kalamansi or Philippine lime, is a variety of the Psychotria hoffmannseggiana plant, native to the tropical regions of the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria hoffmannseggiana var. tribracteata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
